_comment: Template for geography locations. Use this format when generating new locations.
_llm_prompt: Generate 20 geography locations for a guessing game. For each location provide: id (unique kebab-case identifier), name (the place name), clue (a hint without giving away the location - no country/city names), lat (latitude in decimal degrees), lng (longitude in decimal degrees), difficulty ('easy' for famous landmarks, 'medium' for notable places, 'hard' for obscure). Output as JSON array.

example.name: Eiffel Tower
example.clue: Famous iron lattice tower built for a world's fair
